Obtaining Presence Information

The presence service dispenses information based on subscriptions. For a title to take advantage of this service, it must first create a presence subscription and add one or more players to it. The title can then get information on the players in the subscription at any time.

  • Initializing the Presence Service and Creating a Subscription
  • Adding Players to a Subscription
  • Getting Presence Information
  • Removing Players from a Subscription

Initializing the Presence Service and Creating a Subscription

To begin using the presence service, your title first calls the XOnlinePresenceInit function. This tells the presence service that the title is active and will soon request presence information. The title's next step is to call the XOnlinePresenceSubmit function to create a presence subscription.

Adding Players to a Subscription

After a title creates a presence subscription, it can add players to the subscription by calling the XOnlinePresenceAdd function. XOnlinePresenceAdd requires titles to add groups of players to the subscription. However, your title can add a single player to the subscription by defining a group of one individual.

Note    Groups that your title adds to a presence subscription can contain both individuals and teams.

Getting Presence Information

Whenever it needs the latest presence information on the individuals or teams in a subscription, your title calls the XOnlinePresenceGetLatest function. It uses the dwGroupID parameter to pass the group ID for the group it is seeking presence information about. It must also pass in the number of players or teams in the group through the dwUserPresenceBufferCount parameter. XOnlinePresenceGetLatest allocates that number of XONLINE_PRESENCE structures and passes them back to your title through its pUserPresence parameter.

Removing Players from a Subscription

The presence functionality does not support selective removal. As a result, each time you need to remove a user or group of users from the presence subscription, you must clear all users using the XOnlinePresenceClear function, and then re-add the remaining members using XOnlinePresenceAdd.
